title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is a local AI agent available in Claude Pro and Max plans that runs on desktop (Mac and Windows) to automate daily tasks. It can interact with files, emails, calendar, and apps to complete complex workflows, with examples including organizing content, scheduling tasks, and summarizing emails into calendar events.
